goal: Add a pin/star to Your Decks — starred decks float to the front
done: Added a pinned-decks store in data.js (localStorage meowtarot_pinned_decks: getPinnedDecks/isPinnedDeck/togglePinnedDeck). In decks.js each owned deck cell now has a star toggle (top-right of the thumb, role=button + keyboard, stopPropagation so it doesn't trigger deck-activate); tapping toggles pin + re-renders. renderAll sorts pinned decks to the front (stable order otherwise). CSS .decks-cell__pin in decks.css (gold star when pinned, muted otherwise). Cache-bust 20260622f -> 20260622g; www synced. (Shared helpers so the gacha gallery can reuse pin later.)
fix: pinned-decks localStorage store + star toggle on Your Decks cells + pinned-first sort.
verified: headless decks.html: star renders top-right of the deck cell
